raw.message: Join the Battle: Thrilling First-Person Shooter Awaits

hook.summary: High-intensity FPS gameplay montage showing rapid kills.
hook.visual_action: First-person perspective shooting enemies with a shotgun and sniper rifle in a wooden building.

scene_flow: First-person shotgun gameplay inside a wooden structure.
Sniper scope view showing a long-range headshot.
Assault rifle gameplay with red-dot sight tracking enemies.
Close-range pistol combat and final kill.
End card with game logo, character lineup, and CTA.
audience_proxy: Casual to mid-core male gamers who enjoy low-poly, fast-paced first-person shooters.
